raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s on your mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set context before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights driver","name":"What’s been driving the late nights lately?","description":"Surfaces whether the pace is coming from temporary push, rework, or hidden load.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"What’s still on you","name":"What work is still sitting on your plate that you expected to hand off by now?","description":"Checks whether Lin is carrying ownership that could be distributed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation boundary","name":"What do you think only you should keep owning right now?","description":"Gets Lin to name the boundary between essential ownership and delegable work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hand-off friction","name":"What makes it hard to hand more of this off?","description":"Surfaces whether the bottleneck is trust, process, or team capability.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Load relief","name":"What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?","description":"Finds one concrete change that would reduce strain without opening a new agenda.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support ask","name":"What do you need more from me on right now?","description":"Invites Lin to ask for air cover, decisions, or removal of friction.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision drag","name":"Where are decisions slowing things down for you?","description":"Looks for organizational friction that may be pushing work into late hours.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"What to stop","name":"What should we stop doing to keep this pace sustainable?","description":"Forces a trade-off and identifies work that is no longer worth the cost.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we’ve talked through, what’s the first concrete thing you want to change before we meet again?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment without introducing a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
